name: Orion Nebula
description: A diffuse nebula and one of the most observed deep-sky objects.

name: Andromeda Galaxy
description: The nearest major galaxy to the Milky Way.

name: Pleiades
description: A young open star cluster also known as the Seven Sisters.

name: Crab Nebula
description: The remnant of a supernova observed in 1054 CE.
